violations.description: Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. Observed homemade canned relish in the refrigerator and homemade tomatoes sauce in that dry storage room
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed can corn in the storage room on the floor.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observed microwave with dried food debris at time of inspection.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Observed loose hanging debris at time of inspection.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Observed no towels or heated air drying device at the handsink at time of inspection.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — ---Observed ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.--Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed dried food in microwave.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Observed box of single service items on floor in pantry area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floors, walls, and ceiling need to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Observed paint peeling from ceiling in food prep area.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
